requests.title: Create a free Gumroad seller account
requests.detail: Sign up at gumroad.com with divinxxii@gmail.com (or whichever email/name you want the store to trade under). No cost to create. Once made, tell me the store name/URL so I can prep the first product listing (title, description, price, files) for you to paste in and publish. I cannot create this account myself since it registers a real identity/payout destination.
requests.blocks: Listing and selling Product 1.1 (AI Prompt Playbook)

requests.title: Decide on a business/store name
requests.detail: Need a public-facing name for the Gumroad store and product branding. I can propose a shortlist if you want suggestions — just say so.
requests.blocks: Finalizing product listing copy and cover design
